(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED,AND THE COURT ORDERS: [X] PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING NOVEMBER 07, 2016 UNTIL AUGUST 01, 2017. [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $2175.33 WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON THE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. THE ACTUAL AMOUNT OF THE INTEREST MAY CHANGE IF THE PAYMENTS ARE MADE LATE OR EARLY.
